phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pick up the rental car
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde recojo el coche reservado?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh rreh-KOH-hoh el KOH-cheh rreh-sehr-BAH-doh?

likely_response.local: En el aparcamiento exterior, zona marcada B.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL ah-pahr-kah-mee-EHN-toh ehks-teh-ree-OHR THOH-nah mahr-KAH-dah B
likely_response.translation_en: In the outdoor parking, marked zone B.

responses.english: In the outdoor parking, marked zone B.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL ah-pahr-kah-mee-EHN-toh ehks-teh-ree-OHR THOH-nah mahr-KAH-dah B
responses.french: En el aparcamiento exterior, zona marcada B.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to add insurance coverage
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo añado seguro adicional al contrato?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿KOH-moh ah-NYOH-doh seh-GOO-roh ah-dee-see-oh-NAHL al kohn-TRAH-toh?

likely_response.local: Hable con el agente para modificar el contrato antes de salir.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHB-leh KOHN EHL ah-HEHN-teh PAH-rah moh-dee-fee-KAHR EHL kohnt-RAH-toh AHN-tehs DEH sah-LEER
likely_response.translation_en: Speak with the agent to modify the contract before leaving.

responses.english: Speak with the agent to modify the contract before leaving.
responses.phonetic: AHB-leh KOHN EHL ah-HEHN-teh PAH-rah moh-dee-fee-KAHR EHL kohnt-RAH-toh AHN-tehs DEH sah-LEER
responses.french: Hable con el agente para modificar el contrato antes de salir.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to complete rental paperwork
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde se firma el contrato de alquiler?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh seh FEER-mah el kon-TRAH-toh deh al-kee-LEHR?

likely_response.local: En el mostrador central, frente a usted.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR thehnt-RAHL FREHN-teh AH oo-STEHD
likely_response.translation_en: At the central counter, in front of you.

responses.english: At the central counter, in front of you.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR thehnt-RAHL FREHN-teh AH oo-STEHD
responses.french: En el mostrador central, frente a usted.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if GPS units are available to rent
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿tienen GPS disponible para alquilar?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿TYEH-nehn heh-peh-EH-seh dees-poh-NEE-bleh PAH-rah ahl-kee-LAHR?

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there are units available currently.

responses.english: Yes, there are units available currently.
